MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Endy Ukoha-Ajike appeared by telephone for Kenneth Gregory.

The Court stated that it is still looking for courtesy copies of the petition for final distribution and that it does not have a proposed order. Mr. Ukoha-Ajike stated that the previous Attorney's Paralegal was supposed to provide him with the courtesy copies, that there is another related case (Estate of Ernestine Harris), that he is expecting to receive boxes of files and asked for additional time. The First and Final Account and Petition for Its Settlement, etc. is continued to August 28, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

Off Calendar May-29-2018 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-01-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Taylor for Kenneth Gregory

The Court noted that the problems with this petition have not been corrected. Mr. Taylor stated that they were waiting to close the estate a month ago, there is only one asset and requested another date. The Petition for Approval of Status of Administration is Off Calendar. A Status on filing of Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration with proper language and proper notice is set for May 29, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Attorney James Bridgman.

Mr. Bridgman stated that technically he is not in this case yet, that this case is related to the Estate of Ernestine Harris (PES-04-286613), that there are no assets in this Estate until it receives distribution from the Harris Estate, that he is pretty sure this is the only asset and that it makes sense to continue this matter to same hearing date on the Harris Estate. Status on filing of a Petition for Final Distribution is continued to May 2, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Bridgman is to advise Mr. Taylor that it is not happy that he is not present and that he is to file a Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-05-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Scott Bassin for Javier Reyes. William Taylor for and with Kenneth Gregory.

The Court stated that Kenneth Gregory has priority to serve. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration filed by Kenneth Gregory (subject to review of the order). Bond in the amount of $10,000.00 is required. Petition for Letters of Administration filed by Javier Reyes is denied. Mr. Bassin requested for setting of a status date to insure that Letters is issued. A status for the same is set for March 26, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
